5: Having received the answers to his weaponsmithing questions, Godbert bids you rejoin his High Crucible endeavor at your earliest convenience. Meanwhile, the aliens who provided said answers offer their own farewells as they set off to explore the wide world they now call home. Last but not least, Delion thanks you for helping him find the truth behind his outlandish conspiracies, before immediately rushing off in search of some new mystery to misinterpret. One only wonders what became of the inspectors after fate propelled them along their separate celestial trajectories...

※The next Hildibrand quest will be available from Nashu Mhakaracca in Tuliyollal once you have met the following requirements:
※FINAL FANTASY XIV: Dawntrail must be registered to your service account.
